revisedPrompt:
Generate exactly one PNG image.

Use case: game pixel-art animated-sprite sheet.
Asset profile: snes16_platformer_v1.
Preset: hd_motion8_256.
Output canvas: exact 1024x512 px sprite sheet, 4 columns by 2 rows, each cell exactly 256x256 px.
Background: perfectly flat solid #FF00FF chroma-key filling all empty space; no gradients, shadows, texture, floor plane, lighting variation, or transparency.

Reference image role: the attached image is the approved walking sheet for the exact same hero. Treat this as re-posing that same character only. Match the reference character's proportions, head-to-body ratio, body width, total height, palette, dark one-pixel outline style, pixel density, top-left lighting, face, hair shape, ornament placement, clothing shapes, and accessory colors. Do not redesign, restyle, resize, widen, or stocken the character.

Primary request: create an original high-resolution 16-bit-plus pixel-art PLAYER SWORD ATTACK sprite sheet for a bright mythical-Japan top-down 3/4 action RPG. The hero Mito is androgynous, 15 years old, slim but sturdy exactly like the reference, facing DOWN toward the viewer in every frame. Character body is about 70% of each 256px cell height so the fully extended sword always remains inside the cell with a clear margin.

Character identity lock:
- Same exact character in all eight frames.
- Same head size, head-to-body ratio, body width, limb thickness, total upright height, outfit palette, outline thickness, and scale in every frame.
- Re-pose only. Never redraw into a new design.
- Feet stay on the same ground line in every cell.
- Face, chest, and hips remain squarely front-facing in every frame; never turn sideways.

Character details to preserve from reference:
- Ink-black short hair tied into a tiny low ponytail at the nape.
- Vermilion braided-cord hair ornament.
- Calm amber eyes.
- White tube-sleeved top.
- Short indigo-blue haori jacket with small vermilion braided-cord knots on sleeves and hem.
- Loose young-leaf-green hakama trousers tucked into dark leggings with red cord ties.
- Light travel sandals.
- Vermilion braided cord belt-sash with a small tassel.
- Necklace with three pale-green magatama beads.
- At left hip, a sheathed short ritual sword in a white scabbard wrapped with a thin sacred rope and tiny white paper streamers, reading as a festival ritual implement, not a samurai katana.

Sword for attack frames:
- A short straight bright ritual blade.
- White hilt wrapped with a thin sacred rope.
- Small white paper streamers attached, fluttering only as connected parts of the hilt/rope.
- Solid sword only: no glow, no energy effect, no motion trail, no swoosh, no afterimage.

Frame layout and motion phases, arranged exactly in a clean 4x2 sheet:
Top row left to right:
1. WINDUP start: both hands grip the hilt in front of his chest, centered, front-facing.
2. WINDUP peak: blade raised straight up above his head, perfectly vertical, centered, front-facing.
3. STRIKE: blade chopping straight down in front of his torso, vertical overhead cut, front-facing.
4. STRIKE end key pose: arms fully extended downward-forward, blade tip pointing at the ground in front of his feet, decisive pose, front-facing.
Bottom row left to right:
5. FOLLOW-THROUGH: blade low in front of him, shoulders dropped, front-facing.
6. FOLLOW-THROUGH settles: weight settled but still square to viewer, blade still low/controlled.
7. RECOVERY: lifts blade back up toward centered two-hand guard, front-facing.
8. Centered guard stance: front-facing two-hand guard, cleanly loops into frame 1.

Pixel-art style:
- Crisp low-resolution pixel clusters, no antialiasing blur.
- High-resolution 16-bit-style pixel art with fine readable pixel clusters.
- Dark one-pixel outline where useful.
- Consistent bright cheerful palette.
- Top-left light source.

Sheet cleanliness and containment hard rules:
- Exactly one character per cell.
- Every frame stays fully inside its own 256x256 cell.
- Leave clear solid #FF00FF margin between figure/sword and every cell edge.
- No body part, sword piece, streamer, rope, tassel, or stray fragment crosses a cell border.
- No detached fragments: no isolated pixel islands, seam slivers, dust specks, sparkles, leftover effect residue, or floating bits.
- No cell separator lines, grid lines, frame borders, frame numbers, labels, text, UI, signature, or watermark anywhere.

Avoid:
No Mario, Nintendo, Zelda, Final Fantasy, Pokemon, Dragon Quest, Secret of Mana, Okami, Sakuna characters, logos, or likenesses. No samurai armor, no kabuto helmet, no ninja outfit, no two-sword daisho, no gun, no modern objects, no horror mood, no dark gloomy palette, no bird or companion creature, no letter emblems, no modern text, no watermark, no motion trail, no swoosh, no afterimage, no energy effect, no glow.
